commits.title: Deploy rate-limiting middleware to production
commits.expectedResult: Rate limiting deployed on all public API endpoints; P99 abuse rejection rate > 99%.
commits.progressNotes: Deployed to prod on Tuesday. Monitoring dashboards show abuse traffic dropping from 12% to 0.3% of requests. All acceptance tests passed.

checkInHistory.note: Deployed and verified. Monitoring looks great.

commits.title: Migrate legacy auth module to OAuth 2.0
commits.expectedResult: All legacy session-based auth endpoints replaced with OAuth 2.0 token flow. Zero regressions in auth test suite.
commits.progressNotes: Completed the token issuance flow and access token validation. Refresh token rotation and revocation still not done. Auth test suite shows 18/24 tests passing.

checkInHistory.note: Token issuance implemented and unit tested.
Refresh token rotation taking longer than expected. May not finish all endpoints this week.
Revocation endpoint still blocked on security review.

commits.title: Complete GDPR data deletion audit for inactive accounts
commits.expectedResult: Audit report identifying all inactive accounts (> 2 years) with personal data still retained. Deletion scripts reviewed by legal.
commits.progressNotes: Started the database query to find inactive accounts. Query is running but taking much longer than expected due to missing index. Have not yet produced the report or contacted legal.

checkInHistory.note: Query performance is poor; missing index on last_login column.
DBA review of index creation request delayed until next sprint.
Still waiting on DBA. No progress possible without the index.

commits.title: Write runbook for database failover procedure
commits.expectedResult: Runbook documented in Confluence covering failover triggers, step-by-step switchover commands, rollback procedure, and post-failover verification checklist.
